title: CT2.decide.interface completed discharge record — Interface admission — bounded state or typed scope exit
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for semantic CT2-v2 node CT2.decide.interface. It fixes the runtime identity, presentation order, successful status, and exact contract evidence without converting the semantic ID back to a numbered obligation ID.

tacticId.description: Owning tactic discriminator for CT2.decide.interface; it must be CT2.

nodeId.description: Stable semantic runtime identifier for Interface admission — bounded state or typed scope exit.

nodeNumber.description: One-based presentation-order index for CT2.decide.interface; it is not part of the semantic identity.

status.description: Required successful completion state for CT2.decide.interface, matching its decision runtime role.

dischargedContracts.description: Exact contract families discharged at CT2.decide.interface: S-Dich.

contains.description: Requires S-Dich, which provides the exhaustive proof-carrying decision constructors.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract instances for CT2.decide.interface; one S-Dich record is required for each declared family.

schema.description: Discriminator for the S-Dich evidence at CT2.decide.interface; this instance provides the exhaustive proof-carrying decision constructors.

statement.informal: Interface admission — bounded state or typed scope exit.

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Supply the declared proof-carrying state, decision, certificate, or payload. Every outgoing edge is available only through its named typed constructor and evidence slots.
